name: Active Directory Enumeration
description: Detects tools querying Active Directory for users, groups, and computers
query:
// AD Enumeration Detection
// LDAP queries for domain enumeration
events from authentication
where event_type = "ldap_query"
  and (query_filter contains "objectClass=user" or query_filter contains "objectClass=computer")
group by source_ip, username
having count(*) > 100
within 300 seconds
